channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Beyond manufacturing: Vietnam aims to become Asia's next cultural hub
item.description: Government policy and grassroots creators seek to prove Vietnam can export culture alongside consumer goods.

item.title: REE Corp. chair Nguyen Thi Mai Thanh reflects on 40 years navigating Vietnam's economy
item.description: Nguyen Thi Mai Thanh, who served as a medic during the Vietnam War, has since led REE Corp. and witnessed the country's economic transformation.

item.title: Gen Z calls it 'slop' but remains fast casual's most loyal and demanding customers
item.description: A new survey shows Gen Z eats fast casual more than any other generation and holds it to higher food safety standards.

item.title: Vietnam emerges as Southeast Asia's top tourist destination, seeking to avoid Thailand's pitfalls
item.description: The country welcomed 21 million visitors in 2025 and is investing heavily in infrastructure to boost future tourism.
